# SALOME KERNEL minimal slice (static) — Basics + SALOMELocalTrace + Utils.
# Adapted from third_party_ref/looooo_SMESH/cmake/Kernel/CMakeLists.txt (shared -> static,
# per-target *_EXPORTS defines replaced by the global dllexport scheme in the root
# CMakeLists). ${KERNEL_SRC_DIR} is set by the root CMakeLists to staged/src/Kernel/src.
# smIdType.hxx is generated by the root CMakeLists via configure_file (SALOME_USE_64BIT_IDS).

set(Kernel_SRCS
    ${KERNEL_SRC_DIR}/Basics/Basics_Utils.cxx
    ${KERNEL_SRC_DIR}/Basics/Basics_DirUtils.cxx
    ${KERNEL_SRC_DIR}/Basics/BasicsGenericDestructor.cxx
    ${KERNEL_SRC_DIR}/SALOMELocalTrace/BaseTraceCollector.cxx
    ${KERNEL_SRC_DIR}/SALOMELocalTrace/FileTraceCollector.cxx
    ${KERNEL_SRC_DIR}/SALOMELocalTrace/LocalTraceBufferPool.cxx
    ${KERNEL_SRC_DIR}/SALOMELocalTrace/LocalTraceCollector.cxx
    ${KERNEL_SRC_DIR}/Utils/duplicate.cxx
    ${KERNEL_SRC_DIR}/Utils/OpUtil.cxx
    ${KERNEL_SRC_DIR}/Utils/Utils_SALOME_Exception.cxx
    ${KERNEL_SRC_DIR}/Utils/Utils_ExceptHandlers.cxx)

add_library(Kernel STATIC ${Kernel_SRCS})
target_link_libraries(Kernel PUBLIC Threads::Threads)
if(WIN32)
    target_link_libraries(Kernel PUBLIC ws2_32 dbghelp)
endif()

target_include_directories(Kernel PUBLIC
    ${KERNEL_SRC_DIR}/Basics
    ${KERNEL_SRC_DIR}/SALOMELocalTrace
    ${KERNEL_SRC_DIR}/Utils)

if(MSVC)
    target_include_directories(Kernel PUBLIC ${PTHREAD_INCLUDE_DIR})
endif()
